description: Legal deed. Location: Fustat/Cairo. Dated: Tuesday, 2 Elul 5319 AM, which is 1559 CE. In which Yiṣḥaq Luria Ashkenazi (the famous kabbalist) sells 8 1/3 kikars of pepper from his stock in Alexandria to Natan Ḥefeṣ for a sum of 150 Venetian peraḥim. The pepper is to be given to Reuven Bavli, evidently Natan's agent. Information from FGP.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
